import torch
import transformers
from PIL import Image
import cv2

def process_text(text):
    return text.upper()

def resize_image(path, size):
    img = Image.open(path)
    return img.resize(size)

def analyze_video(path):
    cap = cv2.VideoCapture(path)
    return cap.get(cv2.CAP_PROP_FRAME_COUNT)
